---
title: "About"
---

# About Me

I am currently pursuing my MBA at University Canada West in Vancouver, Canada. I also hold a Bachelor of Laws from the University of London.

My background includes experience in banking, accounting support, and legal research. These experiences helped me develop strong analytical thinking, professionalism, and attention to detail.

---

## Career Direction

My goal is to build a long-term career in banking and financial services. I am particularly interested in roles that involve customer service, financial operations, and professional client relationships.

---

## Professional Values

- Accuracy and attention to detail
- Strong communication
- Professional integrity
- Customer-focused mindset
